versions.name: v1 — basic summarizer
versions.systemPrompt: You are a summarization assistant. Be concise.
versions.userMessage:
Summarize the following text in 3 bullet points:

{{text}}

variables.value: Paste your text here to summarize it.

tests.name: concise policy summary
tests.userMessage:
Summarize the following text in 3 bullet points:

{{text}}

versions.name: v2 — structured summarizer
versions.systemPrompt:
You are an expert summarization assistant. Always output:
1. A one-sentence TL;DR
2. 3-5 key points as bullets
3. One open question the text raises

variables.value: Paste your text here to summarize it.

versions.notes: Much better. The open question format is a hit.
